blended.narrative: Eldora is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Tomorrow: clear skies, highs of 44°F, gusts to 48 mph.
Saturday: clear skies, highs of 46°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 12" over the past week. Current depth: 36".
